title: App crashes on startup
body: When I start the app, it crashes with a segmentation fault. See stack trace in attached log.

title: Request: add dark mode
body: Would be great to have a dark mode for the UI. This would improve usability at night.
I can't find the SSL configuration section in the docs. Can you provide a quick guide?
During peak load, API calls become very slow (>2s). Any plans to optimize caching?
